system_logs.message: 自動初始化資料庫完成
01_start_active_visible_v133: 已由 01/02 權威檔回填 SQLite cache 2 筆

system_logs.detail: INSERT OR REPLACE INTO time_records (id, record_key, status, work_order, part_no, type_name, process_name, employee_id, employee_name, start_action, start_timestamp, end_action, end_timestamp, remark, start_date, start_time, end_date, end_time, work_hours, assembly_location, group_key, is_group_work, source, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE security_users SET last_login_at=?, updated_at=? WHERE lower(username)=lower(?)
UPDATE auth_users SET last_login_at=?, updated_at=? WHERE lower(username)=lower(?)

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO auth_account_permissions
                (username,module_code,module_name_zh,module_name_en,can_view,can_create,can_edit,can_delete,can_import,can_export,can_backup,can_restore,can_manage,updated_at)
                VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)

INSERT INTO auth_users
            (username,password_hash,password_hint,employee_id,display_name,email,role_code,is_active,force_password_change,last_login_at,note,created_at,updated_at)
            VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)
            ON CONFLICT(username) DO UPDATE SET
                password_hash=excluded.password_hash,
                employee_id=excluded.employee_id,
                display_name=excluded.display_name,
                email=excluded.email,
                role_code=excluded.role_code,
                is_active=excluded.is_active,
                force_password_change=excluded.force_password_change,
                last_login_at=excluded.last_login_at,
                note=excluded.note,
                updated_at=excluded.updated_at

INSERT OR IGNORE INTO security_settings (setting_key, setting_value, note, updated_at)
        VALUES ('idle_timeout_minutes', ?, '閒置多久自動登出，單位分鐘', ?)

INSERT OR IGNORE INTO security_user_roles (username, role_code, created_at)
            VALUES (?, ?, ?)

INSERT OR IGNORE INTO security_module_permissions (role_code, module_code, module_no, module_name, module_name_en, can_view, can_create, can_edit, can_delete, can_import, can_export, can_backup, can_restore, can_manage, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

INSERT OR IGNORE INTO security_module_permissions (role_code, module_code, module_no, module_name, module_name_en, can_view, can_create, can_edit, can_delete, can_import, can_export, can_backup, can_restore, can_manage, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

INSERT OR IGNORE INTO security_roles
            (role_code, role_name, role_name_en, description, is_system_role, created_at, updated_at)
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, 1, ?, ?)
